docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRANK, ELI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOKA,MOTI COLUCCIO, ROBERT DBA JOHN ROBERTS GALLARY $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,060.00, DISMISS DEFENDANT COLUCCIO WITH PREJUDICE.
